name: Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and shred the carrot.
2. Peel and slice the cucumbers.
3. Blend lemon juice, black pepper, chili powder, butter, and salt together.
4. On a salad plate, arrange the cucumber slices in two layers.
5. Pour the seasoned lemon juice over each layer of cucumbers.
6. Sprinkle the carrot pieces and coriander leaves on top of the final layer.
